name: sauce
description: Sauce vault platform workshop (canonical source). bootstrap.js requires @inquirer/prompts; harnesses (run-helper-cases/run-renderer/run-bootstrap) stay zero-dep.

scripts.release:preflight: npm run test:helpers && npm run test:bootstrap && npm run test:registry && npm run test:migrate-layout && node platform/test/run-cli.js && node platform/test/run-migrate.js && node platform/test/run-audit.js && node platform/test/run-claude-surface.js && node platform/test/run-renderer.js && node platform/test/run-install-sh.js && node platform/test/run-cowork-smoke.js && node platform/test/run-doctor-self.js && node platform/test/run-seed.js
